# Inspection Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-inspection
kind: Inspection
spec:
    checks:
        - example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Inspection
spec:
  checks: [os, arch, swap]
  failFast: true
```
